archive_data.question_text: In which year did Anil Kumble take 10 wickets in a cricket test match?

explanation.english: Anil Kumble achieved the feat of taking 10 wickets in a single Test match inning against Pakistan in Delhi during the year 1999.
explanation.tanglish: Anil Kumble 1999-aam aandu Paakistan edhirthu Delhi-le nadantha cricket test match oru padaththil 10 wickets eduthar.

archive_data.question_text: In which city of Maharashtra is Kalidasa Festival organised every year?

explanation.english: Kalidasa Festival is organized annually in Nagpur, Maharashtra to honour the classical Sanskrit poet Kalidasa.
explanation.tanglish: Kalidasa Festival endru oru nadakam Maharashtra munnuthal Nagpur-le varuda varudam Kalidasa-ai pariththukondadhu.

archive_data.question_text: As per Article 170 of the Constitution of India, the Legislative Assembly of each State shall consist of NOT more than __________ members.

explanation.english: Article 170 of the Indian Constitution states that the Legislative Assembly of each state shall not consist of more than 500 members.
explanation.tanglish: India Arasiyalamaippin Article 170 prakaram, oru maanilathin sutrusoola sabhai 500 paarvaaiyarkalukku melaga irukka koodaathu.

archive_data.question_text: Who appoints the Attorney-General of India?

explanation.english: The Attorney-General of India is appointed by the President of India under Article 76 of the Constitution.
explanation.tanglish: India Attorney-General-aaga President-ale niyamikkappaduvaar, ithu Arasiyalamaippu Article 76-le vazhangappadugirathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which Indian cricketer has written the book 'The Test of My Life'?

explanation.english: Yuvraj Singh authored the autobiography 'The Test of My Life' which describes his battle with cancer and cricket career.
explanation.tanglish: 'The Test of My Life' endra pusthagathai Yuvraj Singh ezhuthiyulavar, ithu avanthan cancer-ai edirppa natathal matrum cricket vazhvi muraiyai varnikkirathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is a negative impact of globalisation on Indian economy?

options.text: Rise of straight-jacketed approach to leadership styles
Rise in female participation in employment

explanation.english: Globalisation can lead to rise in relative deprivation where certain sections feel left behind compared to others benefiting from economic integration.
explanation.tanglish: Ulaga yavvanathin (globalisation) kaaranamaa oru samooha vagaikku vizhundhu poga vendiya nilai, athaavathu arintha thadumaarugal (relative deprivation) meendhal thani padatthanamaagum.

archive_data.question_text: According to the National Jute Board 2022-23, which state is the largest producer of jute?

explanation.english: West Bengal is the largest producer of jute in India, contributing approximately 70-80% of the country's total jute production.
explanation.tanglish: India-le Jute utpadhithal-le West Bengal thaan mikap periya alanthalaiyum seyyum maanilam, idhu 70-80 sadhavisam utpadhithai visithivikkirathu.
